response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content. 2. Identified the talk segment (00:00-02:58). 3. Identified 'Koi no Dance Site' performed by Hakui Koyori (starting 02:59) via on-screen lyric snippets and composer credit 'Tsunku'. 4. Identified 'Ai♡Scream!' (starting 04:56) via on-screen title. 5. Performed web searches for both songs' lyrics. 6. Consolidated the analysis and lyrics into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features a talk segment followed by a live performance featuring 'Koi no Dance Site' (a Morning Musume cover) and 'Ai♡Scream!' (by AiScReam). The performance is part of an event titled '#博衣こより生誕Live2026'.

scenes.description: The video begins with an introductory talk segment featuring Hakui Koyori. No singing occurs during this time.
Performance of 'Koi no Dance Site' by Morning Musume, performed by Hakui Koyori and others.
